cards.title: Genesis Planet
cards.lore: Study final collapse of unstable and formerly forbidden planet.
cards.mission-requirements: Geology + CUNNING>42 + (Biology + Exobiology + SCIENCE OR SECURITY + Transporter Skill + Treachery)

cards.title: Navigate Argolis Cluster
cards.lore: Engage enemy near vital sensor array.
cards.mission-requirements: Stellar Cartography + Navigation x2 + Physics OR OFFICER + Leadership + SECURITY + STRENGTH>36
